title: Trusted Modded
description:
A modpack for the SGC Trusted Modded server.

Includes a set of mods intended to have something for everyone!
body:
A modpack for the Trusted Modded Minecraft server.

The modpack contains a collection of both magic and technical mods. Aimed to provide something for everyone! 

Technical mods like GregTech, Create and Mekanism provide a good set of various technical machines, allowing for interesting production chains and automation. With GregTech, expect a change in how Minecraft is played with many overhauled recipes! Create and Mekanism provide ways to play with mechanical and electrical machines.

Together with mods like Hexcasting, Iron's Spells and spellbooks provides you with the capability of becoming the magician of your dreams together with people on the server!


Vampirism and Werewolves allows for interesting interactions with people, adding another perspective and layer to the gameplay! No longer eating bread to keep on living.


A collection of building mods are also included. Like Chipped, Dave's building extended and Framed Blocks, Chisel & Bits will provide infinite possibilities when building new structures.


All this while still being a high performance modpack. Mods like Acedium, Embeddium and ModernFix makes it possible to run this modpack on less capable machines. With a minimum of only 5-6 GB RAM required to run!

Thanks to:
- [Pam's HarvestCraft 2](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-food-core) series by MatrexsVigil, Rhodox of the Painterly Pack
